alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs with two promotions into strategy and operations leadership
alignments.job_requirement: Lead the vision, strategy and execution of our Manufacturing Industry Practice

alignments.candidate_evidence: Experience scaling global commercial operations, leading transformation programs, and defining cross-functional strategic initiatives at scale
alignments.job_requirement: Build and lead a cross-functional industry team across Value Engineering, Sales, AI Builders and define processes/structure required to accelerate impact

alignments.candidate_evidence: Requirements analysis, UAT, rollout, and transformation experience with direct customer interaction and strategic alignment throughout Google tenure
alignments.job_requirement: Work side-by-side with customers to align manufacturing solutions against their business strategy

alignments.candidate_evidence: Google Devices and Services scaling: commercial operations leadership, transformation program execution, and cross-functional stakeholder management
alignments.job_requirement: Proven record of building and leading a cross-functional team building software solutions against strategic problems

alignments.candidate_evidence: Owns product requirements logic design, UAT, rollout, and transformation for enterprise solutions; not from native engineering PM background but from business problem-solving and implementation perspective
alignments.job_requirement: Proven experience developing software solutions for enterprises with strong portfolio showcasing successful use cases solving real-world problems

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategy and Operations leader scaling transformation programs; no explicit early-stage startup or greenfield venture founding evidence provided
alignments.job_requirement: High degree of entrepreneurship with experience building in a 0->1 environment

gaps.gap: No explicit 0->1 or early-stage startup founding/building experience stated; candidate background is scaling and transformation within established organization
gaps.mitigation: Strategy and Operations transformation experience demonstrates ability to define vision and scale initiatives from concept; entrepreneurial mindset can be validated in interviews around autonomous decision-making and build-first approaches

gaps.gap: Limited consulting brand or classic case-team strategy experience; background is internal Google operations rather than external advisory or discrete project delivery
gaps.mitigation: Customer engagement and requirements gathering experience from transformation work can translate; external credibility as 'face of manufacturing industry' may require ramp-up in public speaking and industry brand building

gaps.gap: Enterprise software product experience is from ownership, requirements, and implementation perspective rather than native Product Management or engineering product discipline
gaps.mitigation: JD emphasizes strategy, vision, and cross-functional leadership over deep PM/SDLC expertise; close collaboration with Product and Engineering teams can compensate

gaps.gap: No explicit manufacturing industry domain expertise mentioned; role requires strategic manufacturing solutions knowledge
gaps.mitigation: Strategy and Operations leadership skills are transferable; customer collaboration and industry partnerships within Celonis will build manufacturing domain rapidly

output.level_rationale: Head of Industry title at a SaaS scale-up with 300+ accounts and 100+ team members, requiring cross-functional leadership, strategy setting, and global P&L accountability. JD emphasizes autonomous leadership, 0->1 thinking, and strategic vision across Sales, Product, AI, and Engineering—consistent with L6 senior leadership scope. No managing-managers explicitly stated, but scope and complexity suggest established senior IC or emerging director-level authority.
output.summary: Head of Industry–Manufacturing role is a strategic leadership position requiring cross-functional team ownership, vision setting, and scaling of manufacturing solutions at a fast-growing SaaS company. Candidate demonstrates strong Strategy and Operations credentials with Google-scale transformation experience, customer engagement, and cross-functional leadership. Gap areas: no explicit 0->1 startup experience, limited consulting or industry brand background, and manufacturing domain expertise will require ramp-up. Role fits primary family (Strategy and Operations / Business Transformation) but sits above typical target band (L4–L5) at L6-equivalent scope.
uncertainties: Celonis company size context (rounds, ARR, stage) not stated in JD; affects L6 calibration if early-stage startup vs. established growth company
Explicit manufacturing industry experience or domain background not mentioned in candidate profile; unclear how quickly domain can be acquired
0->1 entrepreneurship requirement not explicitly demonstrated; candidate background is scaling/transformation of existing operations
Public speaking and external brand credibility ('face of manufacturing industry') not detailed in candidate evidence
